display.purpose: Page title only (e.g. 'Good afternoon, Brandon'). One per route.

headline.purpose: Panel-header h3 (Field conditions, Today's scout list). Sentence case.

body.purpose: Default body and table cells at compact operational scale.

body-sm.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, table footers, sidebar nav meta.

metric.purpose: Stat-card values, weather values. Use tabular-nums.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for state transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover tint shifts; faster than marketing to feel responsive at density.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Focus shifts, panel-state changes, real-time content swaps.

components.name: Page Header Primary Action
components.description: Compact primary button in the page-header action cluster. One per page.
components.html: <button class="ds-portal-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="4"/><path d="M3 7h3l2-3h8l2 3h3v12H3z"/></svg>New scan</button>
components.css: .ds-portal-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: #244f37; color: #f7f5ef; padding: 0.5rem 0.875rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; font: 600 0.875rem/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-portal-primary:hover { background: rgba(36, 79, 55, 0.90); } .ds-portal-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Page Header Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action paired with the primary in the page-header cluster.
components.html: <button class="ds-portal-ghost"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="15" y2="3"/></svg>Export weekly</button>
components.css: .ds-portal-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: transparent; color: #171b19; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.15); border-radius: 0.375rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-portal-ghost:hover { background: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.04); } .ds-portal-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact 4-up metric card with icon, label, metric, meta line, and optional delta chip.
components.html:
+18%
Scans this week1,247vs 1,053 last week
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #f7f5ef; color: #18211c; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.10); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-stat-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-stat-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.06); color: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.70); } .ds-stat-delta { display: inline-flex; background: rgba(47, 107, 69, 0.15); color: #2f6b45; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 600 0.75rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-stat-label { font: 400 0.75rem/1.5 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.60); } .ds-stat-value { font: 600 1.25rem/1 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: #171b19; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-meta { font: 400 0.75rem/1.5 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.55); }

components.name: Status Pill (accent)
components.description: Amber status pill for 'Needs review', 'Due today', and similar attention states.
components.css: .ds-pill-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(178, 107, 44, 0.15); color: #b26b2c; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 600 0.75rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Filter Pill Group
components.description: Inline button group for table filters (All / Flagged / In queue).
components.css: .ds-filter-group { display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.12); border-radius: 0.375rem; } .ds-filter { background: transparent; color: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.65); padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border: none; font: 500 0.75rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-filter:hover { color: #171b19; } .ds-filter-active { background: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.05); color: #171b19; font-weight: 600; } .ds-filter:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: Scout Checkbox
components.description: Compact custom checkbox for the scout-list rows. Done state uses success-green tint, not just a checkmark.
components.css: .ds-scout-checkbox { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 0.875rem; height: 0.875rem; border: 1.5px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.30); border-radius: 0.1875rem; flex-shrink: 0; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; } .ds-scout-checkbox-done { background: rgba(47, 107, 69, 0.15); border-color: #2f6b45; color: #2f6b45; } .ds-scout-checkbox:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.northStar: The Gaia Field System, Operations Voice
narrative.overview: The portal is the operator's daily console. It uses the same gaia-field palette as the public landings, but at much higher density: scale steps drop one level, spacing tightens, and the AppShell sidebar plus topbar replaces marketing's section rhythm. The mood is quiet by default. Color appears only where state demands attention. This is mission-control restraint, not SaaS dashboard polish.
keyCharacteristics: Higher density than the marketing surfaces: body at 0.875rem, metadata at 0.75rem
Map panel as the page hero, not a metric strip
Status conveyed through pills with shape + label + color (never color alone)
Plain-language headings ('Good afternoon, Brandon', 'Today's scout list', 'Devices on the move')
Sidebar + topbar AppShell, fixed; content area scrolls
Modal-first interactions are forbidden - operators are in a workflow

rules.name: The Quiet-by-Default Rule
rules.body: The portal is calm at rest. Color appears where state demands attention and nowhere else. A screen full of color means a screen full of noise.

rules.name: The Opacity Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Secondary and tertiary text are achieved with ink-text/65, /60, /55, not with separate gray tokens.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Exactly one display headline per route (the page title).

rules.name: The Live Region Rule
rules.body: Real-time updates to text content must use aria-live='polite' regions. Operators rely on assistive tech in the cab.

rules.name: The Border Beats Shadow Rule
rules.body: When you want to define a surface boundary, reach for a 1px ink-text/[0.08-0.12] border before reaching for a shadow.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Any shadow is a response to a transient state, never decorative.

dos: Do use linen-100 as the panel background and rely on hairline ink-text/[0.08-0.12] borders for surface boundaries.
Do keep color reserved for state.
Do pair every status indicator with a label and a recognizable shape, not color alone.
Do use plain language in page titles and panel headers.
Do show empty and setup states explicitly.
Do use aria-live='polite' for text content that updates from real-time data.
Do size touch targets for gloved or one-handed phone use.
Do use tabular-numeric on metric values and confidence scores.
Do keep one primary action per page-header action cluster.
donts: Don't reach for a modal as the first interaction.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't apply box-shadows to resting panels. Use borders.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient on any heading or metric.
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, or frosted-card ornament.
Don't introduce playful consumer visuals, soft startup styling, neon gaming, or editorial layouts.
Don't use fake screenshots or placeholder data in shipped views.
Don't use em dashes in body copy.
Don't hard-code single-farm or single-org assumptions in any screen, URL, query, or copy.
